props.message:
BURNT HOLLOW.

The wood that grew here was old when the Source first sang. Khorgaul the Hoarder burned it to its roots and locked the ash in glass. Walk softly. The ground remembers.
Where the ridge narrows: keep your blade drawn. The bone-walkers know every crack of this stone.

A Source-shrine, half-melted into glass slag.

Here Lirien wept, and her tears boiled. The hoarder bled the Source dry into this hollow. Embers still bank in the cracks.
Beyond: the dead-end shelf. The Hoarder's reliquary lies on the far stone — but the path narrows to a bone's-width.
Knights of bone do not forget where their hoard lies. Take only what you can carry. Leave the rest to ash.

props.open_message: A small iron key, scorched but whole. Khorgaul hoarded a thousand such keys; this one knows a lock somewhere far from here.
A piece of the Source — a heart-ember, banked in cracked glass. It warms you back to life.
A scatter of pebbles — fifteen good throwing-stones. The bone-knights notice.
